summary: Indonesia’s first sovereign wealth fund is investing in a mix of funds and private companies as it bets on infrastructure around artificial intelligence, part of a global investment boom in the sector.

title: National Bank Beats on Overall Strength in Major Segments
title_cn: 国家银行在主要领域的整体实力表现出色
summary: National Bank of Canada beat analyst expectations in its fiscal second quarter on strength across major segments while setting aside less than anticipated for bad loans. The shares fell on valuation concerns.

title: Jefferies Says Investors Boost ‘Nuclear Exposure’: ESG Investing
title_cn: 杰富瑞称投资者加大“核暴露”：ESG 投资
summary: Almost two-thirds of fund managers permit some level of “nuclear exposure,” with 34% allowing investments in nuclear weaponry, according to Jefferies Financial Group Inc.’s fourth-annual ESG and defense survey.

title: Goldman Strategists Cite Earnings in Hiking S&P 500 Target to 8,000
title_cn: 高盛策略师表示，标普 500 指数目标将上涨至 8,000 点
summary: Strategists at Goldman Sachs increased their year-end target for the US benchmark to 8,000 points, ditching a previous forecast of 7,600. They see earnings growth powered by the AI boom driving further gains in stocks. Michael Msika reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hormuz Would Reopen One Month After Deal, Iran TV Says
title_cn: 伊朗电视台称霍尔木兹将在协议达成一个月后重新开放
summary: An unofficial draft of a peace deal says the Strait of Hormuz would return to normal within a month, according to Iranian state television. It also says the the US naval blockade would end. Oil prices fell on the news. It's unclear what the US has agreed to. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Drift as Traders Weigh Latest Iran Peace Deal Reports
title_cn: 随着交易员权衡最新的伊朗和平协议报告，美国股市波动
summary: US stocks shuffled between gains and losses on Wednesday, as strategists lifted their S&P 500 year-end targets following a strong earnings season and traders weighed a potential peace deal to end the Iran war.

title: Both Sides of Aisle Support Crypto: Paglia
title_cn: 过道两侧均支持加密货币：Paglia
summary: Katrina Paglia, chief legal officer at Pantera Capital Management, joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." A key Senate panel recently moved forward the so-called Clarity Act even as bank associations said the bill “falls short.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Salesforce Earnings Can Put AI Fears to Bed, Give Stock a Lift
title_cn: Salesforce 的盈利可以消除对人工智能的恐惧，提振股价
summary: While software stocks rebound from the artificial intelligence-driven wipeout earlier this year, Salesforce Inc. hasn’t really benefited. But its earnings after the close Wednesday could pull the company’s shares out of their malaise.

title: SQM Raises Lithium Sales Guidance as Recovery Gathers Pace
title_cn: 随着复苏步伐加快，SQM 上调锂销售指引
summary: SQM reported a sharp increase in first-quarter profit and raised its annual lithium sales forecast as robust demand from battery storage systems helps drive a recovery in prices.

title: Stocks Hold Near Record on AI Trade as Oil Falls: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着油价下跌，股市在人工智能交易中保持接近纪录：市场结束
summary: Hopes for a deal to end the war in Iran and revive the Strait of Hormuz drove oil lower while leaving stocks near record highs, with the market also bolstered by relentless enthusiasm for artificial-intelligence trades.

title: Yardeni Says ‘FEMO’ Is Key to a Rally Built on Reality, Not Hype
title_cn: 亚德尼表示，“FEMO”是基于现实而不是炒作的集会的关键
summary: Veteran market strategist Ed Yardeni of Yardeni Research dismissed concerns that US stocks are in a bubble, arguing the rally is driven by “fabulous earnings momentum” rather than speculation.

summary: Companies in the US and the UK ramped up their currency hedges last quarter as the war in Iran roiled global markets, an industry survey shows.

title: Warner Bros. Wins Investor Consent to Change Bond Agreements
title_cn: 华纳兄弟赢得投资者同意更改债券协议
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. said it won agreement from bondholders to change the terms of some existing debt, bringing the company a step closer to selling itself to Paramount Skydance Corp. in a $110 billion deal.

summary: European stocks edged closer to their pre-war record high as optimism about a possible deal between Iran and the US lifted sentiment and sent oil prices lower.

title: Ed Yardeni Says Dip-Buying Opportunities in This Market Are Wishful Thinking
title_cn: 埃德·亚德尼 (Ed Yardeni) 表示，这个市场的逢低买入机会只是一厢情愿
summary: Edward Yardeni, president at Yardeni Research, says the basic thrust of the market is higher as he touts “FEMO” or the “fabulous earnings momentum” he sees driving a melt up in stocks. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Industrial metals wavered as investors weighed the prospects for a US-Iran peace deal to end the conflict that has dented the outlook for global economic growth.

title_cn: 伊朗电视台称协议草案将恢复霍尔木兹流量，油价下跌
summary: Oil tumbled after Iranian media said it obtained an unofficial copy of a draft for a deal to end the Iran war as traders look for clues that talks might soon lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Guindos Says ECB Must Consider Weaker Growth at June Meeting
title_cn: Guindos表示欧洲央行必须在六月会议上考虑增长疲软的情况
summary: The European Central Bank should take a close look at how badly the Iran war is weighing on the economy when it decides whether to raise interest rates next month, according to Vice President Luis de Guindos.

title: Data Center Firm PolarDC Sets Nordic Record With Junk Bond Sale
title_cn: 数据中心公司 PolarDC 出售垃圾债券创下北欧纪录
summary: Data center operator PolarDC sold €800 million ($930 million) of high-yield bonds in the biggest deal of its kind in the Nordic market.

summary: Copper startup Quilla Resources Inc. is in discussions with prospective advisers about listing shares in Toronto as it weighs expansion plans in Peru.

title_cn: 2026 年 5 月 27 日美国盘前走势
summary: S&P 500 Index futures rise 0.3% as of 7:35 a.m. in New York as optimism around artificial intelligence, lower oil prices and easing bond yields drives bullishness.

title: Stocks Extend Highs; Paxton Defeats Cornyn in Texas Senate Runoff | Bloomberg Brief 5/27/2026
title_cn: 股市延续高位；帕克斯顿在德克萨斯州参议院决选中击败科宁|彭博简报 2026 年 5 月 27 日
summary: AI optimism drives US stocks to another record high.  Market capitalization of SK Hynix and Micron hit $1 trillion. Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton defeated incumbent John Cornyn winning the state's GOP Senate runoff after securing an endorsement from President Trump.  Ella Gude of BNY Investments Newton discusses inflation risks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Mortgage Rates Climb to Highest Level Since August
title_cn: 美国抵押贷款利率升至八月以来最高水平
summary: US mortgage rates increased last week to the highest since August, restraining home-purchase activity and prompting a sharp pullback in refinancing.

title: Adani Firms Extend Rally to Recoup Losses Sparked by Hindenburg
title_cn: 阿达尼公司扩大集会以弥补兴登堡引发的损失
summary: Shares of billionaire Gautam Adani’s group companies have erased all losses triggered by a scathing short-seller report in 2023, as the conglomerate overcomes regulatory challenges.

title: Makhlouf Says ECB Committed to 2% Goal, Won’t Comment on June
title_cn: 马赫卢夫表示欧洲央行致力于 2% 的目标，不会对 6 月发表评论
summary: The European Central Bank is intent to get inflation back to its goal, Governing Council member Gabriel Makhlouf said, refusing to say if that will require an interest-rate increase next month.

title: Investec Raises $43 Million in Debut Loss-Absorbing Debt Issue
title_cn: 天达在首次吸收损失债务发行中筹集了 4300 万美元
summary: Investec became the latest South African bank to issue loss-absorbing debt as local lenders work to comply with the new central bank framework.

title: Roku’s First Major Home Screen Revamp in Years Will Open Up More Ad Opportunities
title_cn: Roku 多年来首次对主屏幕进行重大改造，将带来更多广告机会
summary: Roku Inc. unveiled the first major update to its home-screen user experience in a decade, a move that sets the platform up for additional advertising opportunities.

title: Morgan Stanley's Caron Says This Is a Stock Pickers Market
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的卡伦表示这是一个选股市场
summary: Jim Caron, Morgan Stanley Investment Management portfolio solutions CIO, says this is a stock pickers market, but it's still very important to have a diversified portfolio. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Temu-Owner PDD’s Shares Slide After Sales Miss Estimates
title_cn: Temu 所有者 PDD 的股价在销售未达到预期后下滑
summary: PDD Holding Inc.’s shares fell more than 9% in pre-market US trading on Wednesday after its first-quarter revenue missed expectations partly due to fierce domestic competition and weak consumer sentiment in China.

title: Both Sides of Aisle Support Crypto: Paglia
title_cn: 过道两侧均支持加密货币：Paglia
summary: Katrina Paglia, chief legal officer at Pantera Capital Management, joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." A key Senate panel recently moved forward the so-called Clarity Act even as bank associations said the bill “falls short.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Global Clean-Energy Manufacturing Supply Far Exceeds Demand
title_cn: 全球清洁能源制造业供应远超需求
summary: Clean-energy manufacturers around the world now have double the production capacity needed to meet global renewable energy demand as factory output surges in Asia while the US and Europe lag behind.

title: Dwelly in Talks to Raise $200 Million for AI Property Management
title_cn: Dwelly 正在洽谈为人工智能物业管理筹集 2 亿美元资金
summary: Dwelly, a UK startup that acquires real estate property managers and introduces artificial intelligence to their business, is in discussions to raise around $200 million in equity and debt financing, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: AP CEO Defends Swatch Collaboration
title_cn: AP 首席执行官捍卫 Swatch 合作
summary:
Audemars Piguet's recent collaboration with Swatch led to scuffles outside stores from New York to Paris to Milan, as crowds queued for hours to get their hands on the Royal Pop pocket watch collection. Despite criticism that the collaboration could 'cheapen' the brand, CEO Ilaria Resta says it has made AP more accessible to a younger audience, while the thing she fears most is 'irrelevance'. She spoke on 'The Pulse with Francine Lacqua' on Bloomberg TV on May 26.

Correct: This video has been edited to change an on-screen banner to more accurately reflect the story. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Robinhood Launches AI Stock Trading, Purchases on Credit Cards
title_cn: Robinhood 推出人工智能股票交易、信用卡购买
summary: Robinhood Markets Inc. customers will soon be able to direct artificial intelligence agents to trade equities and make purchases on their credit cards for them.

title: Goldman Strategists Lift S&P 500 Target to 8,000 on Earnings
title_cn: 高盛策略师将标普 500 指数盈利目标上调至 8,000 点
summary: Strategists at Goldman Sachs Group Inc. joined peers at Morgan Stanley and Deutsche Bank AG in seeing a 17% return for the S&P 500 Index this year.

title: Airbnb and Uber Are Competing to Be the Next Big Travel Super App
title_cn: Airbnb 和 Uber 竞相成为下一个大型旅行超级应用
summary: Neither company appears content to lead just one category

title: TSMC CEO Pledges 30%-Plus Incentive Bump as AI Profits Soar
title_cn: 台积电首席执行官承诺随着人工智能利润飙升 30% 以上的激励措施
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. chief C.C. Wei told staff they’ll see more than a 30% bump in their profit-sharing payouts this year on average, responding after some voiced concerns over their incentive plans online.

title: UBS’s Haefele Is Bullish on Equity Rally Broadening Out
title_cn: 瑞银 (UBS) 的海弗勒 (Haefele) 看好股市反弹扩大
summary: Mark Haefele, CIO of global wealth management at UBS, discusses the impact of AI on global equities as he raises his year-end target on the S&P 500 to 7,900. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: More Companies Turn to Monitoring Employee AI Skills
title_cn: 更多公司开始监控员工人工智能技能
summary: Crypto exchange OKX joins KPMG and other firms changing performance evaluations

title: Taiwan Suspects Nvidia AI Chip Shipment Smuggled to China
title_cn: 台湾怀疑英伟达人工智能芯片走私至中国
summary: Taiwan prosecutors suspect three individuals successfully smuggled at least one shipment of Nvidia AI chips to China after first exporting them to Japan, people familiar with the matter said. The trio was detained for allegedly falsifying documents related to exports of Super Micro Computer servers containing advanced Nvidia chips, which the US has barred from sale to China without a license. Bloomberg Intelligence's Matthew Bloxham breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Germany, Spain Push Back on European Plan to Ban Huawei Gear
title_cn: 德国、西班牙抵制欧洲禁止华为设备的计划
summary: Germany and Spain are leading opposition to European Commission plans to ban Chinese technology suppliers from telecom networks as part of new cybersecurity rules, according to people familiar with the negotiations.

title: China to Invest $1.1 Billion in Serbia in AI, Robots and Cars
title_cn: 中国将向塞尔维亚投资11亿美元用于人工智能、机器人和汽车
summary: Chinese companies will pour an additional €940 million ($1.1 billion) to expand their footprint in Serbia, in a major boost to the Balkan country’s economy, President Aleksandar Vucic said.

title: Memory Chip Giant CXMT Heads for China’s Biggest IPO Since 2022
title_cn: 存储芯片巨头长鑫存储即将进行2022年以来中国最大规模的IPO
summary: Memory chip maker ChangXin Memory Technologies Inc. has received approval from the Shanghai Stock Exchange for an initial public offering that’s on track to be the biggest in mainland China since 2022, in a milestone for one of the key technologies of the artificial intelligence buildout.

title: Prediction Markets Are Booming. So Are Worries About Rampant Insider Trading
title_cn: 预测市场正在蓬勃发展。对猖獗的内幕交易的担忧也是如此
summary: Prediction markets, where users can place bets on real-world outcomes in anything from sports and award shows to elections, interest rate decisions, and even military operations, have become a multi-billion-dollar industry in just a few years. Along the way, they have also become the focus of growing concern that some participants are using privileged information to profit.

title: Plenty of Ways to Play AI Trade in Europe, Goldman Sachs Says
title_cn: 高盛表示，在欧洲进行人工智能贸易的方式有很多
summary: Sharon Bell, equity strategist at Goldman Sachs, discusses the artificial intelligence trade and why she thinks European stocks, and not just tech firms, can benefit. She speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI May Impact 120 Million Workers in Advanced Economies
title_cn: 人工智能可能会影响发达经济体的 1.2 亿工人
summary: As global banking executives weigh the potential impact of artificial intelligence on their industry, research by Bloomberg Intelligence finds that AI will likely impact 27% of workers across all sectors in advanced economies — more than 120 million in the 31 countries covered by the study. Bloomberg's Charlie Wells and Ana Andrade have more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Automation, Job Loss Fears and Where New Work Emerges
title_cn: 人工智能自动化、失业担忧以及新工作的出现
summary: Concerns are growing that artificial intelligence could accelerate job losses as automation spreads across industries. This segment examines whether AI will ultimately displace workers or create new forms of employment by complementing human expertise. The discussion focuses on corporate decision‑making, productivity limits, and the challenge of ensuring new jobs are widely shared, as the U.S., China, and other economies race to adopt AI technologies. Simon Johnson, MIT Sloan Professor of Entrepreneurship and Nobel Laureate, joined Stephen on the sidelines of the UBS conference on Insight with Haslinda Amin to discuss the economic, social, and geopolitical implications of AI adoption. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ByteDance Weighs Capex of as Much as $70 Billion in AI Push
title_cn: 字节跳动称人工智能推动资本支出高达 700 亿美元
summary: ByteDance Ltd., the developer of TikTok and a leading force in artificial intelligence, is considering increasing its capital spending to more than double last year’s in a bid to lead the Chinese AI market and challenge the top US players abroad.

title: Memory Chip Frenzy Sends SK Hynix, Micron Into $1 Trillion Club
title_cn: 存储芯片狂潮让 SK 海力士、美光进入 1 万亿美元俱乐部
summary: The breakneck surge in memory-chip stocks is intensifying, sending the market capitalizations of SK Hynix Inc. and Micron Technology Inc. above $1 trillion for the first time, as investors bet the AI boom will lead to a sustained revaluation of the industry.

title: Volvo Car Avoids US Ban on Connected Vehicles Tied to China
title_cn: 沃尔沃汽车避开美国对中国联网汽车的禁令
summary: The Trump administration reached an agreement with Volvo Car AB that will allow the automaker to avoid a US ban on connected vehicles tied to China.

title: Samsung Staff Accept Wage Deal That Averts Chip Plant Strike
title_cn: 三星员工接受工资协议以避免芯片厂罢工
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. union members voted in favor of a compensation deal that will hand chip workers an average bonus of about $340,000, staving off a strike that threatened to disrupt global chip supply.

title: Why Huawei’s New Chipmaking Plan Has Investors Buzzing
title_cn: 为什么华为的新芯片制造计划引起投资者热议
summary: The artificial intelligence boom has triggered an insatiable demand for computing power, with companies such as Amazon.com Inc., Meta Platforms Inc. and Microsoft Corp. pouring hundreds of billions of dollars into data centers and advanced chips developed by US semiconductor giant Nvidia Corp.

title: Singapore Hands Byju's Founder His First Ever Jail Term
title_cn: 新加坡让 Byju 创始人首次入狱
summary: The fallen billionaire was sentenced to six months in jail for contempt of court.

title: Ex-Environment Minister to Quit Carney’s Caucus After Climate Reversals
title_cn: 气候逆转后前环境部长退出卡尼核心小组
summary: A former Canadian environment minister will resign his seat in Prime Minister Mark Carney’s caucus after the government watered down its climate policy.

title: Andy Burnham’s Manchester Boom and the Areas It Left Behind
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆的曼彻斯特繁荣及其留下的地区
summary: Andy Burnham, the hot favorite to be Britain’s next prime minister, has boasted of a growth miracle in Greater Manchester where he’s been mayor for just under a decade.

title: Hormuz May Return to Normal Within Month of Deal, Iran TV Says
title_cn: 伊朗电视台称，霍尔木兹海峡可能在协议达成后一个月内恢复正常
summary: An unofficial draft of a US-Iran interim peace deal says maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz can return to normal within a month of the agreement being finalized, according to Iranian state television.

title: Paxton Trounces Cornyn in Texas After Trump’s Endorsement
title_cn: 特朗普支持后，帕克斯顿在德克萨斯州击败科宁
summary: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton stormed to a blowout victory in the state’s Republican Senate runoff, handily defeating four-term incumbent John Cornyn and setting the stage for a November showdown with a well-funded Democrat, James Talarico.

title: Canada Is in Talks to Buy Saab’s GlobalEye Surveillance Jets to Bolster Military
title_cn: 加拿大正在洽谈购买萨博全球眼监视机以增强军事实力
summary: Canada has entered into negotiations to buy Saab AB’s GlobalEye military surveillance planes, Prime Minister Mark Carney said.

title: Keeping Promise to Putin, Slovak Premier Opens Rebuilt Cemetery
title_cn: 信守对普京的承诺，斯洛伐克总理为重建的公墓开放
summary: Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico unveiled a refurbished cemetery dedicated to the Red Army’s soldiers, fulfilling a promise he made to Russian President Vladimir Putin less than three weeks ago.

title: Canada Property Owners Cry Foul After $1 Billion Indigenous Land-Rights Ruling
title_cn: 加拿大业主对价值 10 亿美元的原住民土地权利裁决表示不满
summary: Landmark court decisions on Indigenous rights have rattled liberal British Columbia — and risk costing the premier his job.

title: Mozambique Disputes $2 Billion Claims for Total LNG Project
title_cn: 莫桑比克对总液化天然气项目20亿美元索赔提出争议
summary: Mozambique is disputing $2 billion in costs that TotalEnergies SE and its partners say they incurred during a years-long stoppage of their liquefied natural gas project that’s under construction in the southeast Africa nation, according to a person with knowledge of the matter.

title: India Should Ease Rules to Revive FDI, Modi’s Former Aide Says
title_cn: 莫迪前助手表示，印度应放宽规则以重振外国直接投资
summary: India should liberalize rules for overseas investors by easing dispute-resolution procedures and offering tax incentives to revive foreign inflows and support economic growth, a former adviser to Prime Minister Narendra Modi said.

title: Trump’s Defeat of Cornyn Is a Win for Him, But Also Democrats
title_cn: 特朗普击败科宁是他的胜利，也是民主党的胜利
summary: President Donald Trump finished off the political career of four-term Texas Republican US Senator John Cornyn, the latest purge in a score-settling revenge tour that burnishes his grip on the GOP base even as it threatens to undercut his near-term agenda for months to come.

title: Czech President Chides Cabinet Over Ukraine Aid, Seznam Says
title_cn: 塞兹南称捷克总统谴责内阁对乌克兰的援助
summary: President Petr Pavel chided the government for halting financial support for a Czech-led multinational ammunition program for Ukraine, saying the move weakened other allies’ willingness to contribute, Seznamzpravy.cz reported.

title: GOP Hardliner Beats Incumbent Texas Oil Regulator in Runoff Vote
title_cn: 共和党强硬派在决选中击败现任德克萨斯州石油监管机构
summary: Republican hardliner Bo French defeated incumbent Texas Railroad Commissioner Jim Wright in a runoff election for the GOP nomination to sit on the Lone Star State’s chief oil regulator.

title: Decisive Paxton Victory Puts Pressure on Republican Detractors
title_cn: 帕克斯顿的决定性胜利给共和党批评者带来了压力
summary: The Texas Senate hopeful will face his biggest test in November

title: Germany, Canada to Sign Major LNG Deal as Europe Seeks Energy Security
title_cn: 欧洲寻求能源安全，德国和加拿大将签署重大液化天然气协议
summary: Canada has reached a deal to supply Germany with liquefied natural gas from a planned facility on the west coast, a boost for Prime Minister Mark Carney, who wants to double the country’s exports to non-US markets.

title: Brazil Police Raid Ex-Rio Governor’s Home in Master Probe
title_cn: 巴西警方突击搜查里约前州长住宅
summary: Brazil’s federal police carried out search-and-seizure warrants against former Rio de Janeiro Governor Cláudio Castro as part of a new phase of the investigation into failed lender Banco Master SA.

title: Former Centcom Head Sees ‘Prolonged’ US Mission in Iran
title_cn: 前中央司令部负责人认为美国在伊朗的使命“长期”
summary: Former US Centcom Commander General Joseph Votel (Ret.), discusses the challenges faced by the US military in the Strait of Hormuz and in finding a peaceful solution to the war in Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Finland Fines Wild Berry Companies After Discovering Cartel
title_cn: 芬兰发现卡特尔后对野生浆果公司处以罚款
summary: Finland uncovered a decade-long cartel among companies buying wild berries from people picking them in the forests and swamps across the Nordic country.

title: South Korean Probe Suggests Iran-Made Missiles Hit Ship in Hormuz
title_cn: 韩国调查显示伊朗制造的导弹击中霍尔木兹的船只
summary: South Korea said an investigation into an attack earlier this month on a cargo vessel near the Strait of Hormuz found the projectiles were likely Iranian-made anti-ship missiles.

title: German Far-Right Plots Purge of Civil Service in Eastern State
title_cn: 德国极右翼密谋清洗东部州的公务员
summary: Germany’s far-right party is vetting public workers ahead of a planned purge of civil servants if it takes control in an eastern region holding an election later this year, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Former Leaders Come Out of the Shadows
title_cn: 前领导人走出阴影
summary: Ex-Prime Minister Tony Blair has weighed in on the state of the UK with a 5,600-word essay.

title: Hungary Reverses Decision to Exit International Criminal Court
title_cn: 匈牙利撤销退出国际刑事法院的决定
summary: Hungary withdrew its decision to exit the International Criminal Court, reversing a process initiated by the country’s previous leader, Viktor Orban.

title: Germany’s Reiche Tells EU to Avoid Harming Exports to China
title_cn: 德国赖希告诉欧盟避免损害对华出口
summary: German Economy Minister Katherina Reiche said the European Union should ensure that any measures it applies on Chinese trade don’t harm the bloc’s exports to the country.

title: Thailand to Quarantine Some Travelers to Keep Ebola Out
title_cn: 泰国将隔离部分旅客以防范埃博拉病毒
summary: Thailand imposed a mandatory 21-day quarantine on people traveling from the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, as the Southeast Asian travel hotspot becomes the first country in the world to implement such strict measures.

title: The Secret Supply Chain Keeping Russia’s Jets in the Air
title_cn: 俄罗斯喷气式飞机保持飞行的秘密供应链
summary: Russian airlines are circumventing US, European Union and UK sanctions by procuring aviation equipment via India, Turkey, the United Arab Emirates and Kazakhstan, among others, a Bloomberg investigation shows. Some spare parts were tracked by serial numbers as they journeyed from Western suppliers to intermediaries to Russian companies. Bloomberg News contacted parties involved in such deals, and several said they would no longer do business with each other or with Russia. Bloomberg's Kate Duffy reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Son of Slain Communist Rattles Investors Ahead of Colombian Vote
title_cn: 被杀共产党人的儿子在哥伦比亚投票前令投资者不安
summary: The son of a slain communist leader is rattling markets ahead of Colombia’s presidential election, as investors weigh whether he can win — and how radically he would govern if he does.

title: Israel Increases Attacks on Lebanon as US-Iran Talks Crawl On
title_cn: 随着美伊谈判进展缓慢，以色列加大对黎巴嫩的袭击力度
summary: Israel stepped up attacks on Lebanon and said its ground forces would move further into the country, potentially complicating US-Iran talks on an interim peace deal.

title: Spanish Police Search Socialist Party HQ in Widening Graft Probe
title_cn: 西班牙警方在扩大腐败调查中搜查社会党总部
summary: Spanish police seized information from the ruling Socialist Party’s headquarters, as part of a broad criminal investigation that’s gripping the country and roiling the government of Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez.

title: Cubanos que eludieron la deportación en EE.UU., ahora están varados en México
title_cn: 逃避美国驱逐出境的古巴人现在滞留在墨西哥
summary: Mientras Washington intensifica la presión sobre Cuba al restringir el suministro de combustible y endurecer las sanciones económicas, también ha aumentado el cerco sobre los migrantes cubanos que viven en Estados Unidos.

title: Cubans Who Long Avoided US Deportation Are Now Stranded in Mexico
title_cn: 长期避免美国驱逐的古巴人现在滞留在墨西哥
summary: As Washington continues to crush the Cuban economy by cutting off its fuel and hammering it with sanctions, it’s also squeezing Cuban migrants in the US.
